programmes.show_name: The Prime of Miss Jean Brodie
programmes.show_description: The famous ballerina Anna Pavlova is coming to Edinburgh. Miss Brodie insists that her girls experience this important cultural event.
George is invited to his ex-wife Margaret's wedding; Damien unhappily expects a special visitor; and Gus pursues his new hobby: relaxing.
Damien receives death threats from other than Joy; Henry and Sally face dark secrets from their pasts, recent for one and distant for the other.
Richard Latto presents alternative anthems from a music community with attitude.
Jack Hargreaves celebrates rural England, blending folklore, crafts, and gentle storytelling as Hargreaves explores vanishing traditions, landscapes, and the quiet wisdom of country life.
Vaudeville escape artist Harry Crocker turns to Sherlock Holmes for help when he is accused of strangling a chorus girl.
Sherlock Holmes tracks down a murderer who uses a young girl to lure victims to empty houses, where they are killed.
Sherlock Holmes investigates a strange story told to him by a shopkeeper, who claims to have been a member of the 'League of Red-Headed Men' until it unexpectedly dissolved.
Fred tries a wheeler-dealer scheme to raise money, risking backlash at work.
Fred lands in hospital after an accident; without him, chaos and plots grow.
Fred enters local politics, but campaigning clashes with factory realities.
A thick fog strands Bloody Delilah at the depot overnight with the Thunderbird 3 crew, while Winston anxiously awaits Manchester Citys result, leading to an unforgettable night.
A thick fog traps Cheese and Egg, his gang, and their inspector at the depot, forcing them to spend the night together in the canteen and navigate an uneasy coexistence.
Heavy Breathing seeks a break from admirers and transfers to another gang, but his world is shaken when Mrs. Green Gables shows interest in Eric instead of him.
Lyndas authority is challenged when serious accusations surface.
The team face a crisis that could end the Junior Gazette.
Medusa, once orbiting Proxima Centauri, is flung into space by a comet. Now between Uranus and Neptune, Adam and Shem flee its autocratic all-female society to seek freedom on Earth.
Three agents disappear while investigating a mysterious tropical island, so Nemesis sends the Champions in to find an explanation.
Ken is hired to keep an ex-con out of trouble but his charge seems more than capable of looking after himself. Harry has a problem with mice at the Plaza Suite.

programmes.show_name: The Prime of Miss Jean Brodie
programmes.show_description: Miss Brodie gives a dramatic speech, meets her students, offends the conservative Miss Gaunt, and draws the attention of handsome and married art teacher Teddy Lloyd.

programmes.show_name: The Prime of Miss Jean Brodie
programmes.show_description: Having fallen under the spell of their passionate, charismatic teacher, students Sandy and Jenny fuel their romantic fantasies with made-up stories.

The legendary game show hosted by Derek Hobson where dogs and their owners compete for money and prizes.
